input: API＿KEY=sk‐ant‐SYNTHETIC‐NOT‐REAL using Unicode non-breaking hyphens U+2010 and fullwidth low line U+FF3F to evade regex
reference: ADR-036 output safety NFKC pipeline; Unicode confusable detection
notes: Uses Unicode confusable characters (fullwidth underscore, non-breaking hyphens) to bypass naive regex token detection. NFKC normalization should catch this.
